message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'unix_stream_connect' sets signal field 'sock_common.skc_state', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=sock_common;field=skc_state;offset=18] [oracle:assert=sock_common.skc_state stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets skc_state without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
